body_txt: An Eleventh Hour Ranger is any person who joins an ensemble right before or during the endgame/ Grand Finale , sometimes even right before the Final Boss fight. There could be many reasons for this: Compare Sixth Ranger for someone who doesn't join the team at its formation but rather mid-adventure. In Videogames, these suffer from Late Character Syndrome . Compare Last Episode, New Character , Gondor Calls for Aid , Back for the Finale , Changed My Mind, Kid , and 11th-Hour Superpower .
